Template Root Cause Analysis

drain3 template-level co-occurrence · Causal ranking · Jaccard similarity

v2/rca.templates
Analyzing…
Advanced options

Templates in the same bucket are co-occurrences

Min buckets a template must appear in

Lower → larger, looser clusters

Cap on distinct template bodies analysed

How it works: Each drain3 template observation is treated as an event (template_body, log_timestamp). Bodies that fire in the same time bucket are linked by Jaccard similarity; pairs above the threshold are merged into clusters. When a failure body is given, co-occurring templates are ranked by how consistently they fire before the failure — positive lead time means a probable root cause, negative means a downstream consequence. Click any template in a cluster to instantly run RCA for it.
Select a duration and click Analyze to discover template-level co-occurrence clusters.
Add a failure template body to rank probable root causes.
{% endblock %}
